title: indices.get_index_template

name.description: Name of index template to retrieve. Wildcard (*) expressions are supported.

local.description: If true, the request retrieves information from the local node only. Defaults to false, which means information is retrieved from the master node.

flat_settings.description: If true, returns settings in flat format.

master_timeout.description: Period to wait for a connection to the master node. If no response is received before the timeout expires, the request fails and returns an error.

include_defaults.description: If true, returns all relevant default configurations for the index template.

description:
Get index templates.

Get information about one or more index templates.
